metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for writing and style analysis

plugins.name: stilwerk
plugins.description: Style analysis, authorship attribution, and text transformation. Combines quantitative stylometry with AI-assisted qualitative analysis.

plugins.name: fusion
plugins.description: Multi-domain AI agent orchestration framework. 13 project-agnostic specialized agents (3 parameterised by domain — code/data/strategic/knowledge; investigator parameterised by a project-supplied capture-layout rule) with a compliance guard, churn detection, decision-record tracking, and a real-time browser-based monitor. /fusion:help inside Claude Code for self-explainer.
